author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Play Starbased NOW

Starbased is live!   

Play the SAGE Labs update now and contribute to your faction's efforts in upgrading and maintaining vital starbases! To ensure everything works as intended, the first epoch will have 0 ATLAS and players won't be able to deposit LP.  However, you can still earn LP to deposit later. 

When connecting to your original account created on V1/V2, a transaction may pop up to create a points account (Earning XP/LP). Otherwise, you may also create a new account completely. If you encounter any bugs or have feedback, please use ⁠No Access 

Learn more about what's included in Starbased: https://medium.com/star-atlas/announcing-starbased-a-new-chapter-in-the-star-atlas-sage-saga-5dc3b9abe44d

 | Play now
